MIME-Version: 1.0
From: Start Daily <microsoft.start@email2.microsoft.com>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Wed, 01 May 2024 08:36:49 -0700
Subject: College protests updates: NYC mayor blames 'outside agitators' for protests
Message-ID: <66326195.050a0220.5828b.2362SMTPIN_ADDED_BROKEN@mx.google.com>
Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en-us"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" name="viewport"><title>Start Daily</title></head><body bgcolor="#f0f0f0"><table align="center" bgcolor="#f0f0f0" border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" dir="left" style="font-family:Segoe UI,-apple-system,helvetica Neue,Helvetica,Lucida Grande,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif" width="100%">
        <tr><td><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" height="52" style="background-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 3px 0 transparent" width="600"><tr><td align="left" style="padding:0;min-width:150px;min-height:50px;vertical-align:middle"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADQ5VQ4DHSXUIAA4V7IG7WUJWBR3AYV2P4GHFD6JJXRHMWLKQOZI5NGPLZ4WWI6IEWD7QQDOWSBFJAE4HR5YSAUQXIV7SCF4UDZZPZ3BOVPCV54OHWOJAP3HCUSQLHNMIUWQYRMT5YQPKVRBWMGAWI7QZ6JDDNLBZXYZXE6RNWQWJICWASBCY&d=AIAADKQJNMZBUPXMT4JYY4UNMTUZ5XTYKA5CGUJ5FGYLERWO6FFBKEZAJXD5Y6XKYVDQ4UZM7SVDENB47F4FBRL2Z6BN7TS3566FQBHNYNWXVKSBL5K3QFZ72XFNO5FS6WDR5VAZGCJJCIZ2MNIZJG3QXNRUZMLMDEMKWNKTUMVY5MUN7PQGGNWB23QI4DSUDMWG3EO5STPAHHZJIQ&" id="NewHeaderMicrosoftStartImg" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="MSN" height="45" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.34427CBFF3D4D1C8119FED16222B4DEE&pid=BEmail" style="border:none;text-align:center" width="150"></a></td></tr></table></td></tr>
